0.title: ApproximateAgeOfOldestMessage
0.query:
timeseries approximate_age_of_oldest_message = avg(cloud.aws.sqs.approximate_age_of_oldest_message), by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd name=entityAttr(dt.entity.custom_device, "entity.name")
| sort arrayAvg(approximate_age_of_oldest_message) desc
| limit 20

1.title: ApproximateNumberOfMessagesNotVisible Sum
1.query:
/*
Warning:
 - Rollup `value` is not supported in DQL.
*/
timeseries approximate_number_of_messages_not_visible_sum = avg(cloud.aws.sqs.approximate_number_of_messages_not_visible_sum), by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd name=entityAttr(dt.entity.custom_device, "entity.name")
| sort arrayAvg(approximate_number_of_messages_not_visible_sum) desc
| limit 20
